parameters.query: SELECT '{{ $json.article_id }}' AS article_id, '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/[\r\n]/g, " ") }}' AS title, '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/[\r\n]/g, " ") }}' AS content, '{{ $json.link }}' AS link, '{{ $json.source_feed }}' AS source_feed, '{{ $json.published_at }}' AS published_at, COUNT(*) AS count FROM corporate_events WHERE article_id = '{{ $json.article_id }}';

nodes.name: Check Processed Article
nodes.notes: Set SQLite database path to D:\MARKET_INTEL\database\market_intel.db

parameters.command: =python "D:\\MARKET_INTEL\\scripts\\news_engine\\save_bse_event.py" "{{ String($json.article_id || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, '').trim() }}" "{{ String($json.title || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, ' ').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim() }}" "{{ String($json.company_name || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, ' ').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim() }}" "{{ String($json.event_type || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, ' ').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim() }}" "{{ String($json.sentiment || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, '').trim() }}" "{{ $json.impact_score }}" "{{ String($json.link || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, '').trim() }}" "{{ String($json.published_at || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, '').trim() }}" "{{ String($json.raw_response || '').replace(/[\"\\r\\n]/g, ' ').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim() }}"
